prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南京大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1299名、445名、348名、482名。2021年位次较高主要因当年招生计划仅31人且专业组含不限选科组拉低了门槛；2022年起选科要求统一为物理+化学，位次大幅前移至445名，2024年进一步升至348名，2025年小幅回落至482名。近3年位次在348–482名区间波动，2025年基准位次约482名；南京大学在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年31人、2022年37人、2024年40人、2025年40人。2026年计划招生28人，较2025年减少12人，缩招幅度约30%，属大幅缩减，将显著加剧竞争，推动录取位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年稳定在第5–6名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生有极强吸引力；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及食堂管理（帝王蟹定价争议）和不为专硕提供宿舍等事件，但均非核心学术或师德问题，对报考意愿影响有限。抖音热度总排名第17位（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映考生关注度持续高涨。2022年曾因专业组投档线差异引发中关注，但未出现严重断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，A-及以上学科达26个，其中A+学科包括中国语言文学、化学、地理学、地质学、外国语言文学、大气科学、天文学、工商管理、物理学、环境科学与工程、计算机科学与技术等，学科实力极为雄厚，对考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 天津市2021–2025年考生总数持续增长（54025→71938人），2026年预计约82000人（较2025年增长约14%），竞争压力进一步加大。南京大学在津招生专业以计算机、人工智能、电子信息等热门工科为主，社会热度高；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，非天津市本地高校，无本地招生倾斜。该校在天津招生规模较小（历年30–40人），属于跨省招生，受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次482名、2026年计划大幅缩招30%、天津市考生总数持续增长约14%、抖音热度高企等多重因素，竞争将显著加剧，推动录取位次前移。同时声誉偏负面有轻微抑制作用。经综合权衡，预测2026年南京大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次约365名，波动区间315–415名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能
- 计算机科学与技术
- 理科试验班（匡亚明学院大理科班）
- 计算机科学与技术（计算机金融实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类
- 理科试验班类（化学与生命科学类）
- 技术科学试验班
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班
- 软件工程（软工商业创新班）
- 理科试验班类（数理科学类）
- 工业工程（智能系统集成实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约365名，区间315–415名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于315名（如300名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（人工智能、计算机科学与技术）；位次在365–415名区间建议以二档电子信息类、技术科学试验班为主；位次接近415名或略低于415名，建议以三档工科试验班、数理科学类稳妥保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nanjing University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 1299, 445, 348, and 482 respectively. The higher ranking in 2021 was mainly due to only 31 enrollment slots that year and a subject group with no subject restrictions, which lowered the threshold; starting from 2022, the subject requirements were unified to Physics + Chemistry, causing the ranking to move significantly forward to 445, further rising to 348 in 2024, and slightly falling back to 482 in 2025. In the past three years, the ranking fluctuated between 348 and 482, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 482; Nanjing University's enrollment plan in Tianjin's comprehensive category: 31 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 40 in 2024, and 40 in 2025. The 2026 plan is to enroll 28 students, a decrease of 12 from 2025, a reduction of about 30%, which is a significant cut that will intensify competition and push the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026 is stable at 5th to 6th, firmly among the top universities in the country, strongly attracting high-scoring students; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving cafeteria management (the king crab pricing controversy) and not providing dormitories for professional master's students, but these are not core academic or teacher ethics issues, so their impact on application willingness is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranks 17th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting sustained high attention from candidates. In 2022, there was moderate attention due to differences in subject group admission cutoffs, but no serious gaps were recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it had 26 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Chemistry, Geography, Geology, Foreign Languages and Literature, Atmospheric Science, Astronomy, Business Administration, Physics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: From 2021 to 2025, the total number of candidates in Tianjin continued to grow (54025 to 71938 people), and in 2026 it is expected to be about 82000 (an increase of about 14% from 2025), further increasing competitive pressure. Nanjing University's enrollment majors in Tianjin are mainly popular engineering fields such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information, with high social popularity; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Tianjin, so there is no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment scale in Tianjin is small (30-40 people over the years), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the baseline ranking of 482 in 2025, a significant 30% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, a continuous increase of about 14% in the total number of candidates in Tianjin, and high Douyin popularity, competition will significantly intensify, pushing the admission ranking forward. At the same time, the slightly negative reputation has a mild inhibitory effect. After comprehensive weighing, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Nanjing University in Tianjin's comprehensive category in 2026 will be approximately 365, with a fluctuation range of 315-415.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Computer Science and Technology
- Science Experimental Class (Kuang Yaming College, Big Science Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Computer Finance Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information
- Science Experimental Class (Chemistry and Life Sciences)
- Technical Science Experimental Class
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class
- Software Engineering (Software Business Innovation Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematical and Physical Sciences)
- Industrial Engineering (Intelligent System Integration Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 365, range 315-415. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than 315 (e.g., within 300), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology); if the ranking is in the 365-415 range, it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Electronic Information and Technical Science Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to 415 or slightly below, it is recommended to safely choose Tier 3 majors like Engineering Experimental Class and Mathematical and Physical Sciences.
